strings.MOFFEIN_PILOT_BODY_UTILITY_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsDamage>Obstupefaciens</style>. In aerem lancearis et <style=cIsUtility>parachutam tuam activas</style>. Hoc in aere utens <style=cIsHealth>elevationem minuit</style> pro maiore <style=cIsUtility>vi antrorsum</style>.
strings.MOFFEIN_PILOT_BODY_SECONDARY_DESCRIPTION: Arma tua in <style=cIsDamage>sclopetum intelligens penetrans</style> muta quod pro <style=cIsDamage>3x160% damno</style> facit. <style=cIsDamage>50%</style> plus damni contra scopos <style=cIsUtility>volantes</style>. Usque ad 2 tenere potes.
strings.MOFFEIN_PILOT_BODY_SPECIAL_SCEPTER_DESCR: <style=cIsUtility>Impelle</style> et bombam <style=cIsDamage>ad pedes tuos</style> pone quae hostes in aerem <style=cIsDamage>tollit</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>800% damno</style>. <style=cIsDamage>6</style> vicibus activari potest. Usque ad 2 tenere potes.
strings.MOFFEIN_PILOT_BODY_SECONDARY_ALT_DESCRIP: Arma tua in <style=cIsDamage>iaculator granatarum energiae</style> muta quod pro <style=cIsDamage>480% damno</style> facit. Dum <style=cIsUtility>volans</style>, pro <style=cIsDamage>3x220% damno</style> facit. Usque ad 2 tenere potes.
strings.MOFFEIN_PILOT_BODY_PRIMARY_ALT_DESCRIPTI: <style=cIsUtility>Agilis</style>. Celerrime armis tuis iacula pro <style=cIsDamage>140% damno</style>.
strings.MOFFEIN_PILOT_BODY_MAIN_ENDING_ESCAPE_FA: ..atque ita evanuit, caelum in perpetuum inattingibile.
strings.MOFFEIN_PILOT_BODY_OUTRO_FAILURE: ..atque ita evanuit, caelum in perpetuum inattingibile.
strings.MOFFEIN_PILOT_BODY_SPECIAL_ALT_DESCRIPTI: Aream pro <style=cIsDamage>4x400% damno</style> oppugna, hostes in aerem <style=cIsDamage>tollens</style> in ultimo ictu.
strings.MOFFEIN_PILOT_BODY_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..atque ita discessit, somniis de caelo iam infra relictis.
strings.MOFFEIN_PILOT_BODY_PRIMARY_SILENCER_DESC: <style=cIsDamage>Interfector</style>. Pistola silentii tua iacula pro <style=cIsDamage>100% damno</style>.
strings.MOFFEIN_PILOT_BODY_UTILITY_ALT_DESCRIPTI: <style=cIsUtility>Ante te impelle</style> et <style=cIsUtility>muro adhaere</style> dum <style=cIsDamage>30% velocitatem impetus</style> accipis. Ante propelle cum <style=cIsUtility>de muro saltas</style>.
strings.MOFFEIN_PILOT_BODY_SPECIAL_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Impelle</style> et bombam <style=cIsDamage>ad pedes tuos</style> pone quae hostes in aerem <style=cIsDamage>tollit</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>600% damno</style>. <style=cIsDamage>3</style> vicibus activari potest. Usque ad 2 tenere potes.
strings.MOFFEIN_PILOT_BODY_LORE: United Enterprise Shipping pilotis ex toto universo noto suadet ut ad programma nostrum Commissionum Auctarum pro Pilotis Praelatis se offerant! Beneficia comprehendunt accessum ad augmentationes cyberneticas pro facilioribus terrigenis, programma certificationis Armorum et Securitatis, et opportunitates recreationis luxuriosae! (Candidati quinque annis ante operationes volatus applicare expectantur. Cybernetica non omnibus participantibus promittitur. Certificationes Armorum et Securitatis solum per UES valent. Omnes opportunitates sicut-dantur proponuntur nec ulla emolumenta ulteriora praesumuntur, quaecumque iura maritima spatii in planetis participantibus fiant.
strings.MOFFEIN_PILOT_BODY_PRIMARY_RETURNS_DESCR: Armis tuis iacula pro <style=cIsDamage>160% damno</style>. Omnis tertius ictus pro <style=cIsDamage>320% damno</style> facit et <style=cIsDamage>penetrat</style>.
strings.MOFFEIN_PILOT_BODY_DESCRIPTION:
Pilot est pugnator volans qui in damno de superne pluendo excellit.<style=cSub>

< ! > Pilot periculum vitare potest in aere manendo. Callidus usus artium eius maximam moram aeris tibi concedet.

< ! > Scopus Captus! adhiberi potest ut casum tuum frenares.

< ! > Expeditio Velox sursum it cum in terra utitur, et ante cum in aere utitur.

< ! > Hostes in caelum Impetu Aerio pelle, deinde id cum Scopo Capto! coniunge ut eos in aere versites.
strings.MOFFEIN_PILOT_BODY_PRIMARY_DESCRIPTION: Armis tuis iacula pro <style=cIsDamage>160% damno</style>. Omnis tertius ictus <style=cIsDamage>explodit</style> et pro <style=cIsDamage>320% damno</style> facit.
strings.MOFFEIN_PILOT_BODY_SPECIAL_ALT_SCEPTER_D: Aream pro <style=cIsDamage>8x400% damno</style> oppugna, hostes in aerem <style=cIsDamage>tollens</style> in ultimo ictu.
